lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
The car is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor signs of wear on the interior and exterior from regular use. All major mechanical systems are functioning properly, and the car has been well-maintained.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition and has been meticulously cared for since day one. The exterior paint is flawless, with no chips, scratches, or swirl marks, and it has been kept in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the leather upholstery remains supple and looks brand new, with no creases or signs of wear. Every feature and electronic component functions perfectly, and the car comes with a complete, documented service history from the dealership. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that is truly in showroom condition, with no mechanical or cosmetic imperfections whatsoever.

Looking for a reliable daily driver at a fantastic price? This vehicle is ready to hit the road! It has been well-loved and shows some honest cosmetic wear and signs of use, but it remains a solid, functional choice for your transportation needs. It's a great opportunity to get into a dependable model that still has plenty of miles left to offer with just a bit of continued care.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it does show its age. The exterior has several visible scratches, some minor paint fading on the roof, and a small dent on the rear bumper. Inside, the cabin shows moderate wear with some staining on the carpets and a small tear in the driver's seat upholstery. Mechanically, the car is functional and starts up without issue, but the brakes are nearing the end of their life and will need service soon. All major electronics and the climate control system are working properly. This is an honest car for someone who prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an interior and exterior preserved in a state of absolute refinement. Meticulously serviced and handled with the utmost care, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle that mirrors its original factory delivery standards. Every detail underscores a commitment to excellence and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it's in such incredible shape that it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this car since day one, and it's been kept in truly pristine condition. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person—super clean inside and out. You really have to see it to believe how perfect it is. I'm looking for someone who will love it as much as I have, so come grab this beauty before it's gone!

This collector-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) represents the zenith of the naturally aspirated S54 inline-six era. The powerplant features a high-pressure double-VANOS system and six individual throttle bodies, delivering a linear power band to an 8,000 RPM redline. Shifting is
Used car in mint condition. Flawless exterior. Pristine interior. Mechanically perfect. Clean title.

Presenting an absolute showroom-standard specimen that defies its age. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in an exterior finish that is entirely free of rock chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. The paint retains its original deep luster, complemented by pristine alloy wheels wrapped in fresh, high-performance rubber. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and every feature—from the premium audio system to the dual-zone climate control—operates with factory-fresh precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service portfolio and a whisper-quiet engine bay. This is not just a used car; it is a collector-grade investment for the most discerning enthusiast who demands perfection.

Presenting an exemplary vehicle of peerless quality, maintained in showroom condition. This automobile exhibits flawless aesthetic integrity and mechanical precision, representing the pinnacle of its class. Meticulously preserved and rigorously inspected, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the most discerning client. Secure this definitive acquisition today.

Presented in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a history of meticulous maintenance and climate-controlled storage. This is an unrivaled opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire an investment-grade example that performs as exquisitely as it presents. We invite serious inquiries to experience this benchmark of excellence firsthand.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? I’ve absolutely babied this car, and it’s in truly flawless shape! It’s been garage-kept, kept super clean, and honestly, it drives like an absolute dream. I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to be totally obsessed with it. Come take a look—you won’t find a cleaner one out there!

Available is a museum-quality E46 M3, a masterclass in high-revving atmospheric performance. The heart of this machine is the S54 inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned VANOS system, both recently serviced to exacting standards. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe—a critical preventative measure—and a bespoke suspension geometry utilizing corner-balanced KW V3 coilovers for neutral handling dynamics. The drivetrain is anchored by a lightning-fast Getrag 6-speed manual and a fresh limited-slip differential. Cosmetically, the factory finish retains its original luster with zero orange peel or road rash, while the undercarriage remains dry and free of oxidation. This is a turn-key, mechanically overhauled specimen for the purist seeking a definitive analog driving experience.
Mint condition. Spotless interior. No exterior damage. Full service history. Mechanical inspection passed.

Presented in breathtaking, showroom-fresh condition, this vehicle is a true collector-grade example that defies its age. Every inch of the exterior gleams with a deep, mirror-like finish, free from any swirls, stone chips, or imperfections, having been professionally detailed and kept under a breathable cover in a climate-controlled garage. Step inside to an interior that still carries the scent of premium leather; the upholstery is taut with absolutely no bolster wear, and the dashboard and trim remain in factory-new state without a single blemish. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive, documented history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively by master technicians. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line—tight, responsive, and exceptionally smooth. This is a meticulously preserved time capsule for the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection. All original keys, owner’s manuals, and a complete binder of service records are included.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an uncompromising standard, its condition is truly beyond reproach, offering a showroom-fresh aesthetic and mechanical integrity that satisfies even the most discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such peerless quality and distinction.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a level of care that preserves its original integrity. We invite discerning buyers to acquire this benchmark of automotive excellence.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely flawless condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, and it’s been kept tucked away in a climate-controlled garage. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership headache, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

Offered is a concours-level 2004 BMW M3 (E46) Coupe, a definitive example of German engineering. This chassis features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant, utilizing individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system that has been meticulously calibrated. The 6-speed Getrag manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a factory-spec limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. Significant preventative maintenance includes reinforced rear subframe mounting points and rod bearing replacement, ensuring long-term mechanical durability. The suspension retains its original geometry with fresh bushings and dampers, providing the precise turn-in and lateral stability the E46 is renowned for. This is a
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Step into what can only be described as a true time capsule. This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since the day it left the lot. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its deep factory luster thanks to a professional ceramic coating and a strict hand-wash-only regimen—you will find no swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings here. Inside, the cabin is an oasis of luxury that remains in untouched condition; the premium leather is supple with absolutely no wear on the bolsters, the carpets are protected by original floor mats, and it has never been smoked in. Mechanically, this car performs exactly as it did on day one. It comes with a complete, documented service history from authorized dealerships, showcasing that every preventative maintenance milestone was met early. From the spotless engine bay to the mirror-finish wheels wrapped in high-performance tires with deep tread, every detail has been preserved for the next owner. This is a turn-key opportunity for a discerning buyer who demands the absolute best.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Meticulously inspected and curated for the discerning driver, it offers a rare combination of mechanical integrity and aesthetic perfection, representing a premier acquisition for any collection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that reflects its original showroom state. This specimen represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior devoid of any discernible wear. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, meeting the exacting standards of the most discerning enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels brand new? I’m parting with my absolute gem of a car, and honestly, it’s in flawless condition! I’ve babied this thing from day one—no scratches, no dents, just pure perfection. It drives like a dream and still has that fresh-car smell. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions
